Carousel container. Wraps dvfy-slide elements in a horizontally scrollable
snap container. Navigation buttons and pagination dots are rendered entirely
by CSS pseudo-elements on Chrome 135+; older browsers get equivalent JS-driven
buttons and dots injected alongside the element.

tags.name: dvfy-checkbox
tags.description:
Checkbox input with label, tri-state cycling, and size variants.

When the `indeterminate` attribute is set at initialization, clicking
cycles: indeterminate → checked → unchecked → indeterminate → ...
Without `indeterminate`, standard binary toggle applies.

attributes.description: Show indeterminate (dash) state; enables tri-state cycling

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Visual size: xs | sm | md | lg | xl (default: "md")

attributes.name: label-position
attributes.description: Label placement: top | right | bottom | left (default: "right")

tags.name: dvfy-compare-slider
tags.description: — Clip-path image comparison slider Overlay two images (before/after) and reveal via drag using clip-path. Hardware-accelerated — no layout shifts since clip-path doesn't affect layout. Inspired by Emil Kowalski: https://emilkowal.ski/ui/the-magic-of-clip-path Usage: Any block element can be used in the slots (not just images).

Renders a text input that opens a floating calendar panel. Supports single
date, date range, time, and datetime modes. Fully keyboard accessible with
locale-aware display formatting.

Collapsible drawer panel for side or bottom content.

A reusable panel that slides in from a configurable edge. Supports

the parent layout stays fixed.

tags.name: dvfy-page-transition
tags.description:
<dvfy-page-transition> — View Transitions API wrapper

Seamless cross-page (MPA) and in-page (SPA) transitions via the native View
Transitions API. MPA mode is zero-JS — just add the element once per page.
SPA mode wraps DOM mutations via startTransition(). HTMX integration is
automatic when the `htmx` attribute is present.

Browser support: Chrome 111+, Edge 111+, Firefox 128+, Safari 18+.
Gracefully degrades to instant transitions in older browsers.

attributes.name: animation
attributes.description: Preset: fade | slide-left | slide-right | slide-up | slide-down | scale (default: "fade")

attributes.name: duration
attributes.description: Speed: fastest | fast | normal | slow | slowest (default: "normal")

attributes.name: htmx
attributes.description: Auto-enable HTMX globalViewTransitions when htmx is detected

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: view-transition-name for named element morphing between states

events.name: transition-start
events.description: Fires when a SPA transition begins

events.name: transition-finish
events.description: Fires when a SPA transition completes, detail: { success }

cssProperties.name: --dvfy-pt-duration
cssProperties.description: Override transition duration (defaults to duration attr)

tags.description: Page navigation with ellipsis and prev/next controls.

events.name: page-change
events.description: Page changed, detail: { page }

tags.name: dvfy-transition-root
tags.description:
<dvfy-transition-root> — View Transitions API page/element morphing

Wraps HTMX navigation in document.startViewTransition() for smooth
element-level morphing between pages and states. Hero images, headers,
and cards animate seamlessly between routes — zero framework required.

Also processes the dvfy-transition-name attribute on any descendant element,
mapping it to the CSS view-transition-name property for named element morphing.

Attributes:
  duration: CSS time value, e.g. "300ms" or "0.3s" (default: "300ms")
  easing:   CSS easing function (default: "ease-out")
  mpa:      boolean — inject

attributes.name: duration
attributes.description: CSS time value for transition speed (default: "300ms")

events.name: transition-start
events.description: Fires when a view transition begins

events.name: transition-finish
events.description: Fires when a view transition completes, detail: { success }

slots.description: Content to wrap; place around HTMX-driven page regions
